testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_328] Ensure that ALB is configured with defensive or strictest desync mitigation mode
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_223] Ensure ECS Cluster enables logging of ECS Exec
[NONE][CKV_AWS_332] Ensure ECS Fargate services run on the latest Fargate platform version
[NONE][CKV_AWS_333] Ensure ECS services do not have public IP addresses assigned to them automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_97] Ensure Encryption in transit is enabled for EFS volumes in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_249] Ensure that the Execution Role ARN and the Task Role ARN are different in ECS Task definitions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_335] Ensure ECS task definitions should not share the host's process namespace
[NONE][CKV_AWS_334] Ensure ECS containers should run as non-privileged
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_41] Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
[NONE][CKV_AWS_388] Ensure AWS Aurora PostgreSQL is not exposed to local file read vulnerability
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_17] Ensure all data stored in RDS is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_211] Ensure RDS uses a modern CaCert
[NONE][CKV_AWS_388] Ensure AWS Aurora PostgreSQL is not exposed to local file read vulnerability
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_17] Ensure all data stored in RDS is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_211] Ensure RDS uses a modern CaCert
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_277] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
[NONE][CKV_AWS_24] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 22
[NONE][CKV_AWS_25] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
[NONE][CKV_AWS_130] Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_19] Ensure that all EIP addresses allocated to a VPC are attached to EC2 instances
[NONE][CKV_AWS_20] S3 Bucket has an ACL defined which allows public READ access.
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_44] Ensure AWS route table with VPC peering does not contain routes overly permissive to all traffic
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_56] Ensure AWS Managed IAMFullAccess IAM policy is not used.
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_76] Ensure AWS ALB attached WAFv2 WebACL is configured with AMR for Log4j Vulnerability
[NONE][CKV_AWS_19] Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket is securely encrypted at rest
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_35] AWS NAT Gateways should be utilized for the default route
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_69] Ensure AWS RDS database instance configured with encryption in transit
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_69] Ensure AWS RDS database instance configured with encryption in transit
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_20] Ensure that ALB redirects HTTP requests into HTTPS ones
[NONE][CKV_AWS_57] S3 Bucket has an ACL defined which allows public WRITE access.
[NONE][CKV_AWS_150] Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled

failure.message: Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.main File: /alb.tf: 1-15 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-150
1 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 2 | 3 | name = "prontosalud-alb" 4 | load_balancer_type = "application" 5 | 6 | internal = false 7 | 8 | security_groups = [ 9 | aws_security_group.alb_sg.id 10 | ] 11 | 12 | subnets = [ 13 | aws_subnet.public_a.id 14 | ] 15 | }

failure.message: Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_ecs_task_definition.backend File: /ecs_task_definition.tf: 1-29 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-336

Resource: aws_subnet.public_a File: /subnets.tf: 1-11 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-vpc-subnets-do-not-assign-public-ip-by-default
